response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in software development and some exposure to geospatial data processing, but lacks direct experience with C++ and specific navigation systems.
strengths: Experience with diverse programming languages and technologies
Background in geospatial data processing through GISCollective
Strong problem-solving skills demonstrated through various projects
concerns: Limited experience with C++ and Rust
No direct experience with navigation systems or routing data pipelines
Diverse experience may indicate lack of deep expertise in specific areas
